info.title: Optimus AI Platform API
info.description: Full REST API specification for the Optimus AI platform covering authentication, users, chats, models, files, knowledge, prompts, tools, groups, functions, skills, memories, notes, channels, automations, calendar, folders, configs, and third-party integrations.

get.description: Socket.IO transport handshake. Returns session details for upgrading to WebSocket or polling.

post.description: Socket.IO polling transport POST endpoint for sending messages.

BearerAuth.description: JWT access token. Obtained via /api/v1/auths/signin or /api/v1/auths/signup.

ApiKeyAuth.name: Authorization
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key with 'sk-' prefix. Passed as 'Bearer sk-...'

key.description: sk-* prefixed key (shown once at creation)
